description_long: This is a modern, rectangular table with a minimalist design, featuring a long, dark wood or wood-like tabletop supported by a sturdy metal frame. The table includes an attached, smaller side platform or shelf, elevated and offset to one side, supported by a matching metal frame. The main tabletop is spacious and flat, suitable for communal or public use, while the side platform provides an additional surface for placing smaller items. The metal legs are angular and geometric, giving the table a contemporary, industrial look. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, with a matte finish that resists glare. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or moving parts, emphasizing functionality and clean lines.
description: A modern, rectangular table with a dark wood-like top and metal frame, featuring an attached elevated side platform. The design is minimalist and industrial, with smooth, hard surfaces and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the main tabletop and the attached elevated side platform on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the main tabletop and the square shape of the elevated side platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the offset placement of the side platform to the left and the supporting metal frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main tabletop's length and the side platform's position on the left.
